full_text:
Guanqiu Xing 毌丘興
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guanqiu Xing (毌丘興)was born in Hedong. Warned by Cao Cao not to send anyone to the Qiang but ignored the advice. Guanqiu Xing was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
